title: crotalaria youngii
intro: Crotalaria youngii is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or legume family. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria youngii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria youngii include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be made from the leaves, roots, or stems of the plant.
